characters.appearance: A white, humanoid robot face with striking blue eyes and smooth, metallic features. It appears exclusively on the screen of a giant smartphone.
characters.wardrobe: None visible; only the robotic face and neck are shown.

characters.appearance: A young man with a muscular build, dark hair, and a beard. He is seen only from behind.
characters.wardrobe: Shirtless, wearing dark shorts. The words 'ME NO ENGLISH' are written in black on his back.
characters.demeanor: Attentive and seated in a relaxed, cross-legged posture.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Hello, what is your name?

Character B says: My name is Rahul.

Character A says: How old are you?

Character B says: I have 22.

Character A says: I have 22 नहीं, I am 22 years old होता है। [Not 'I have 22', it should be 'I am 22 years old'.]

Character B says: Okay okay. I am 22 years old.

Character A says: Where are you from?

Character B says: I am Uttar Pradesh.

Character A says: I am Uttar Pradesh नहीं, I am from Uttar Pradesh होगा। [Not 'I am Uttar Pradesh', it will be 'I am from Uttar Pradesh'.]

Character B says: Ohh... ठीक है। मुझे English अच्छे से नहीं आती। [Ohh... okay. I don't know English well.]

Character A says: कोई प्रॉब्लम नहीं। AI tutors के साथ practice try किया? [No problem. Have you tried practicing with AI tutors?]

Character B says: वो तो महंगे होते होंगे ना? [They must be expensive, right?]

Character A says: बिल्कुल नहीं। Supernova app बहुत affordable है। यहाँ आप बिना किसी झिझक के रोज़ practice कर सकते हो। [Not at all. Supernova app is very affordable. Here you can practice daily without any hesitation.]

Character B says: पर टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.]

Character A says: रोज़ की सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट की practice काफी है। धीरे-धीरे बिल्कुल confident हो जाओगे। [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. Slowly you will become completely confident.]

Character B says: Wow, कैसे join करूँ? [Wow, how do I join?]

Character A says: ये install का बटन दबाओ और Supernova app install करो। रोज़ practice करो और अपनी English बेहतर बनाओ। चलो, शुरू हो जाओ। [Press this install button and install the Supernova app. Practice daily and improve your English. Come on, get started.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with relatable, common English grammar mistakes and gentle, non-judgmental correction.
- Addresses common learner objections (cost and lack of time) with practical, reassuring solutions.
- Replaces aggressive timeline guarantees with a focus on consistent daily practice and building confidence.
- Ends with a clear, encouraging call to action to download the app.

scenes.supernova_script: Character B says: Install now पे क्लिक करो और Supernova app डाउनलोड करो। [Click on install now and download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the final, direct call to action.
- Reinforces the brand name visually and audibly.
- Provides a clear next step for the user.
